Jo Bauer

2026 BRITISH GRAND PRIX 
03 - 05 July 2026 
  
 
From :  The FIA Formula 1 Technical Delegate  
To :  The Stewards Date :  03 July 2026 
  
 
Technical Delegate’s Report 
 
 
The following drivers will start the ninth Competition of the 2026 Formula One World 
Championship with a new internal combustion engine (ICE): 
 
Number Car Driver Previously used ICE 
    
55 Atlassian Williams Mercedes Carlos Sainz 2 
31 Haas Ferrari Esteban Ocon 2 
87 Haas Ferrari Oliver Bearman 2 
10 
Alpine Mercedes Pierre Gasl y 2 
43 Alpine Mercedes Franco Colapinto 2 
11 Cadillac Ferrari Ser gio Perez 2 
77 Cadillac Ferrari Valtteri Bottas 2 
 
The internal combustion engine used by the above drivers is one (1) of the four (4) new internal 
combustion engines allowed for the 2026 Championship season and this is in conformity with 
B8.2.2 a) of the 2026 Formula One Sporting Regulations.
